headline: NVIDIA and Global Industrial Software Giants Bring Design, Engineering and Manufacturing Into the AI Era
summary: NVIDIA and Industrial Software Giants Cadence, Dassault Systèmes, PTC, Siemens and Synopsys are bringing NVIDIA CUDA-X, Omniverse and GPU-accelerated industrial software and tools to their customers to accelerate design, engineering and manufacturing. headline: Synopsys Showcases NVIDIA Partnership Impact and Ecosystem Innovation at GTC 2026
summary: Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ: SNPS) at NVIDIA GTC 2026 is showcasing the progress and impact of its strategic partnership with NVIDIA to revolutionize design and engineering across industries. R&D teams, from the semiconductor industry to aerospace, automotive, industrial and beyond, face significant engineering challenges including increasing workflow complexity, escalating development costs, and time-to-market pressure.
